detail:
Server error: HTTPDriver for http://localhost:8123 received ClickHouse error code 60
 Code: 60. DB::Exception: Unknown table expression identifier 'hl_spot_pairs' in scope SELECT pair_index, base_index, quote_index, base_name, quote_name, base_token_id, quote_token_id, updated_at FROM hl_spot_pairs ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 0, 200. (UNKNOWN_TABLE) (version 25.8.2.29 (official build))
